# Subject line: Elevate BLVD Residential with Specialized Window Upgrades*Created: Tuesday, November 28, 2023 at 3:22:43?PM*<div>Subject line: Elevate BLVD Residential with Specialized Window Upgrades<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Hello Yaakov,</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I had the opportunity to visit your Menlo Park location yesterday and had a conversation with Jane. I learned about your role as the Director of Property Management at BLVD Residential, I felt compelled to reach out.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>At HasteMultiFamily, we specialize in upgrading windows for multi-family housing, and we're known for our high standards and innovative approaches that minimize construction-related disruptions. I believe our expertise can significantly contribute to enhancing the comfort and value of the properties under your management.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I would welcome the chance to discuss how we can collaborate to meet BLVD Residential's specific needs. Would you be available for a brief call to explore this further?</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Leon Basin</div>
<div>VP of Business Development</div>
